_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: The most significantly deregulated pathways were Wnt signaling (FDR=0.021) including CIS genes Tnks and Gsk3β, and major neighboring genes: Strn, Axin1, and Dvl1, and Stat3-associated cellular carbohydrate metabolic process (FDR=0.023)
details: Successfully identified Wnt signaling (FDR=0.021) and Stat3-associated cellular carbohydrate metabolic process (FDR=0.023) as most significantly deregulated pathways
